title: Calendar Sharing & Stability Improvements
description: We've added the ability to automatically send calendar events in your messages, making it easier to coordinate and share schedules. This release also includes important reliability improvements and better crash reporting to help us keep RPLY running smoothly.
features: Auto-send calendar events in your conversations for seamless scheduling
Improved crash reporting to help us fix issues faster
fixes: Fixed cursor popup flickering when hovering quickly over messages
Resolved issue where the floating window wouldn't follow your active conversation
Improved app stability and performance under the hood
